title: dolichos aciphyllus
intro: Dolichos aciphyllus, also known as the climbing dolichos or Indian horse gram, is a type of legume vine native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Dolichos aciphyllus include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve blood circulation, and support kidney function. In herbal preparations, Dolichos aciphyllus is often used as a decoction or powder, and can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or added to food products to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
